What We Offer

Three Services. One Growth System.

We don't just run ads or build websites in isolation — we engineer a connected growth engine where each service amplifies the others.

🌐

Website Development

High-converting, mobile-first websites engineered to rank on Google and turn visitors into paying customers.

  • SEO & GEO Optimized
  • Mobile-First Design
  • CRM & Booking Integration
  • AI Lead Response Built-In
Learn More →
📣

Paid Advertising

Data-driven campaigns across Facebook, Instagram, Google, and TikTok — managed for maximum return on every dollar.

  • All Major Platforms
  • Audience Research & Strategy
  • Retargeting Campaigns
  • Weekly Optimization
Learn More →
🤖

AI Automation

AI-powered systems that reply to leads, book appointments, and nurture customers across every channel — 24/7.

  • WhatsApp, IG, FB, SMS
  • Instant Lead Qualification
  • Auto Appointment Booking
  • CRM & Follow-Up Automation
Learn More →

Our Process

How We Build Your Website

1

Discovery

We learn your business goals, audience, and competitors to set the right foundation.

2

Design

We craft a custom design focused on brand identity and conversion psychology.

3

Development

We build with clean code, SEO structure, integrations, and performance baked in.

4

Launch

We go live, test every element, and hand you a fully optimized, live website.

Our Process

How We Run Your Campaigns

1

Research

Deep market, competitor, and audience analysis before a single dollar is spent.

2

Strategy

We build a full-funnel campaign strategy matched to your revenue goals.

3

Launch

Campaigns go live with full conversion tracking and creative testing from day one.

4

Optimization

Weekly reviews, A/B tests, and bid adjustments to compound performance over time.

Automate My Business →
🤖
ScaleStack AI is active  ·  Responding in <3 sec
Lead · 1:47 AM
Hi, saw your ad. How much does a website cost?
ScaleStack AI · 1:47 AM
Hey! 👋 Our websites start from $299/mo, including hosting, SEO, and a booking system. Want me to send you the full breakdown?
Lead · 1:48 AM
Yes! Do you also run ads?
ScaleStack AI · 1:48 AM
Absolutely — Facebook, Google & TikTok. I've gone ahead and booked you a free 15-min strategy call tomorrow at 10 AM. Check your WhatsApp for the confirmation! ✅
📅
Appointment Booked Automatically
CRM updated · Follow-up sequence activated
847
Leads This Month
< 3s

94%
Conversion Rate
Our Process

How We Automate Your Business

1

Business Analysis

We map your lead flow, customer journey, and identify every automation opportunity.

2

AI Setup

We build and train your AI assistants on your products, tone, and sales process.

3

Integration

We connect AI to your CRM, calendar, website, and all messaging channels.

4

Optimization

Ongoing refinement of AI responses, conversion flows, and follow-up sequences.

FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before getting started.

Most websites are completed within 2–4 weeks from the kick-off call, depending on the plan and complexity. We work in structured sprints so you see real progress every few days, not just at the end.
We recommend a minimum ad spend of $500–$1,000/month to generate meaningful data and leads. Most clients see positive ROI within the first 30–60 days. We'll recommend the right budget during your free strategy call based on your goals and industry.
Yes — our AI systems integrate with most major CRMs (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Salesforce, Zoho), calendars (Google, Calendly), and messaging platforms. During onboarding, we assess your current stack and build integrations that connect seamlessly with what you already use.
Yes. Our advertising service is fully managed month-to-month. This includes campaign creation, audience updates, creative testing, weekly optimization, and a monthly performance report. You stay focused on serving customers while we grow your pipeline.
Absolutely. Many clients start with one service and layer on others as their business grows. Because we manage all three, adding advertising to your website or AI to your campaigns is seamless — the systems are already built to work together.
All plans include ongoing support via email and chat. Growth Accelerator and Elite clients get a dedicated account manager and priority response times. We also provide weekly check-ins and monthly strategy reviews to ensure continuous improvement and alignment with your goals.
Let's Get Started
